message:
Improve bundle budget test error handling and CLI sync lock logic

- bundle-budget.test.ts: Add stdout to error context, fix type assertions to use String()
- offline.ts: Consolidate duplicate acquireSyncLock retry paths after unlink
- synonyms.perf.test.ts: Fix log message wording ("tokens" → "terms")

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
